obligations_discharged: Added Lean source constructor Dbounded.targetDifferenceSurjectivePrimitiveOfTargetDifferenceProviderW601 by identity closed-embedding specialization.
obligations_derived_or_eliminated: W923 primitive target-difference surjectivity is now derived from the canonical W713 target-only provider surface.
W923 primitive target-difference surjectivity is now derived from W601's closed-embedding-indexed target-difference provider.
W944 target no-univ data is now derived from W601 target-difference plus W601 target-codomain compactness, delegating compact-space-to-no-univ data to W930.
The W923-specific primitive provider is no longer a separate API frontier; the honest remaining target frontier is the older W601/W713 target-difference provider plus target-codomain compactness.
